justification: The diff upgrades Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, and correctly removes deprecated @Autowired annotations in favor of constructor injection (lines 17-18, 21-22). However, it fails to adopt Java 21 idioms (no records, pattern matching, or virtual threads) and only partially updates deprecated properties (spring.datasource.initialization-mode -> spring.sql.init.mode). The Guava version bump to 29.0-jre is conservative but not fully aligned with modern standards.
